data.description:
## What

Parking-lot (status `idea`) for the two lower-value interface inventories the audit
also proposed: a generated **Python public-API inventory** and a generated
**config-key inventory**. These are deliberately NOT committed as active work yet —
the CLI and MCP references (sibling tickets) carry most of the client value, and the
env-var registry is already generated. Promote this to `open` only if there is
demonstrated reader demand or drift pain.

## Rationale for parking (not shipping now)
- `docs/config.md` is primarily a hand-authored design-of-record; a generated key
  table would complement, not replace it — lower leverage than CLI/MCP.
- The Python public API is comparatively stable and already described by
  `docs/api-stability.md` / `docs/reuse-surface.md`.

## Acceptance Criteria (if promoted)
- [ ] A generator emits `docs/config-reference.md` (config keys) and/or
      `docs/python-api-reference.md`, each marked generated, with a CI drift gate.
- [ ] Output derives from the config schema / public `__all__` respectively.

Files (if promoted): `scripts/gen_config_reference.py` (new),
`scripts/gen_api_reference.py` (new), `docs/config-reference.md` (new),
`docs/python-api-reference.md` (new), `.github/workflows/test.yml`.
data.title: idea: Generate Python public-API + config-key inventories (parking lot)
